Title: RESOURCE DRIVE: DELIVER MATERIAL DONATION
Description:
ArcCorp needs your help.

Under Imperator Addison’s new Second Life initiative, they’ve introduced a government program that will reward whichever company gathers the most resources to help with the regen crisis. ArcCorp is eager to win, and to do that we need plenty of reliable and dependable contractors.

If you can knock out this easy hauling job and show you’re competent, then I can start offering you some more complicated work next.

For this job, you’ll need a ship that can take <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>multi-tool with a tractor beam attachment</EM4>. Once you’re ready, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, grab the cargo from the freight elevator, and deliver it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Easy, right?

If you want to keep track of how ArcCorp is stacking up against the competition, you can go to the <EM4>Second Life Resource Drive</EM4> section of your Journal. If you do really well and help us get to the top, I’ve been given permission by my superiors at ArcCorp to reward the hardest working contractors with some extra stuff on top of whatever credits you earn.

Come work for ArcCorp and be part of the winning team.


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp
